actions.message: Pistol! Put the two of them down.
Clear the yard — fight your way to the far gate.
Locked gate ahead — get to it and find a way through.
Gate's locked — I saw a key back in the yard.
Last stand — hold the yard, then get out.

stages.message: THEY’RE RIGHT BEHIND YOU — GET THE PISTOL!
🐰 MORE IN THE YARD — CLEAR THE LAWN!
🐰 THEY’RE EVERYWHERE — FIGHT TO THE EAST GATE!
🐰 THEY’RE IN HERE TOO — FIND THE KEY!

keyLocks.speaker: Nat
keyLocks.armText: Locked. I need the key — saw it back in the yard. Go find it.
keyLocks.unlockText: Got the key. Gate's open — move.
